name: groundline
description: Lightweight control plane skills for current agent runtime state, radar, and evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Control plane skills for agent state, radar, and evidence.
interface.longDescription: GroundLine is a lightweight control plane for Codex, Claude Code, and Antigravity. It keeps capability blueprints, detects runtime and ecosystem drift, prepares research and upgrade packets, and guides agents through current-state proof, side-effect boundaries, live evidence, and handoff.
defaultPrompt: Resume prior agent work after checking current state.
Close this deployment with live evidence.
Run GroundLine doctor and recommend the next agent mode.
